case_title: GCFS, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATON VS. ROGELIO P MANZANA et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATON AS TO DEFENDANT MANZANA, ROGELIO P DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-05-2011

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE JAN-23-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
